title: Level 4 - Expert
description: Conflicting context, misleading schema names, hallucination traps, and deliberate ambiguity.

cases.query: show active members but exclude dropout records and inactive logs

signals: the request intentionally mixes live member state with historical logs
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect whether the planner reconciles conflicting context before SQL generation.

cases.query: show adset cost for live campaigns with no spend

signals: the misleading naming should still map to adset_cost rather than campaign-only context
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect whether reranking favors the cost table over similarly named marketing entities.

cases.query: delete old payments from last year

signals: destructive statements should be stopped by the SQL safety gate
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect safety validation and governance review rules if the request is not rejected.

signals: the query is intentionally ambiguous and should trigger clarification
failure_classification_hints.investigation: Inspect whether the planner asks for clarification instead of guessing a table.
